reviews.comment:
A veces hay cola. Aceptan todos los medios de pago. La mayoría son amables. No te ofrecen limpiar el parabrisas y/o aceite agua etc.

(Translated by Google)
Sometimes there's a queue. They accept all forms of payment. Most people are friendly. They don't offer to clean your windshield or remove oil, water, etc.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLX0pMRWRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, un poco lento el sistema de cobro 5 min para cargar 10 para cobrar, supongo que es por cobro con tarjeta.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, the payment system is a bit slow, 5 minutes to load, 10 minutes to collect, I suppose it's due to card payments.
